mapper.select: SELECT name, table_name AS tableName, column_name AS columnName, category, level, unit, description, available_chart AS availableChart, default_chart_type AS defaultChartType FROM metric_definition

SELECT metric_id AS metricId, name, table_name AS tableName, column_name AS columnName, category, level, unit, description, available_chart AS availableChart, default_chart_type AS defaultChartType FROM metric_definition WHERE category = #{category} AND column_name = #{columnName}
